steps.action: POST /api/v1/verify with matching scores (bw=1.0, fp8=1.0, bf16=1.0, ar=1.0, ornn_i=100.0, ornn_t=100.0, qualification=Premium)
steps.observed: Status 'verified', server_ornn_i=100.0, server_ornn_t=100.0, server_qualification=Premium, all metric_details match=true, delta=0.0

steps.action: POST /api/v1/verify with mismatched scores (same components but ornn_i=95.0, ornn_t=88.0, qualification=Standard)
steps.expected: Status 'mismatch' with per-metric details showing ornn_i, ornn_t, and qualification deltas
steps.observed: Status 'mismatch', metric_details: ornn_i delta=5.0 match=false, ornn_t delta=12.0 match=false, qualification match=false. Server computed ornn_i=100.0, ornn_t=100.0, qualification=Premium

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (match case: status=verified), POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (mismatch case: status=mismatch with per-metric deltas)

steps.action: POST /api/v1/verify with test vector 1: bw=1.0, fp8=1.0, bf16=1.0, ar=1.0
steps.observed: server_ornn_i=100.0, server_ornn_t=100.0 — exact match with expected formula output

steps.action: POST /api/v1/verify with test vector 2: bw=1.25, fp8=0.95, bf16=1.1, ar=0.85
steps.observed: server_ornn_i=111.5, server_ornn_t=98.75 — exact match with expected formula output

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (vector 1: server_ornn_i=100.0, server_ornn_t=100.0, status=verified), POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (vector 2: server_ornn_i=111.5, server_ornn_t=98.75, status=verified)

steps.action: POST /api/v1/verify with Premium boundary: bw=0.9, fp8=0.9, bf16=0.9, ar=0.9 (ornn_i=90, ornn_t=90, composite=90)
POST /api/v1/verify with Standard case: bw=0.75, fp8=0.75, bf16=0.65, ar=0.65 (ornn_i=75, ornn_t=65, composite=70)
POST /api/v1/verify with Below case: bw=0.5, fp8=0.5, bf16=0.5, ar=0.5 (ornn_i=50, ornn_t=50, composite=50)
POST /api/v1/verify with edge case: bw=0.95, fp8=0.95, bf16=0.79, ar=0.79 (ornn_i=95, ornn_t=79, composite=87)
steps.expected: qualification=Standard (composite=87 >= 90? No because ornn_t=79 < 80 floor; but composite >= 70 and both >= 60 so Standard)
steps.observed: server_qualification=Standard, status=verified — correctly classified as Standard, not Premium, due to ornn_t=79 < 80 floor

evidence.network: POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (Premium: composite=90, both>=80), POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (Standard: composite=70, both>=60), POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (Below: composite=50), POST /api/v1/verify -> 200 (Edge: composite=87 but ornn_t=79<80 → Standard)

frictions.description: Rate limit of 3 requests per 10 seconds required sleeping between test batches, slowing down the test execution
frictions.resolution: Added 11-second sleep intervals between batches of 3 requests

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-API-005 confirmed verified/mismatch status with per-metric deltas. VAL-API-007 confirmed exact formula recomputation (Ornn-I=55*(bw/ref)+45*(fp8/ref), Ornn-T=55*(bf16/ref)+45*(ar/ref)) for two deterministic test vectors. VAL-API-008 confirmed Premium/Standard/Below qualification gates with floor logic including edge case where high composite but one floor below threshold correctly classifies as Standard.
